name: Tee'd Up Tavern
about: Tee'd Up Tavern is a multi-venue entertainment destination located in two renovated buildings on Malvern, Iowa's historic Main Street. It features two state-of-the-art indoor golf simulators, allowing golfers to play on over 240 famous courses from around the world year-round. The facility offers a unique combination of golf, drinks, and games, making it suitable for both dedicated golf practice and social gatherings. Patrons have the option to bring their own clubs or rent a set, and they can book up to four hours at a time per simulator.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 240+ famous golf courses from around the world
State-of-the-art Golfzon TwoVision simulators with high-quality tech
Ability to play year-round regardless of weather conditions
Option to bring your own clubs or rent on-site
Multiple booking options including reserving both simulators simultaneously

food_and_drink.notes: Limited menu of chips and frozen pizzas available. Guests are permitted to bring in food from neighboring restaurants: Classic Cafe, The Salty Heifer, or Casey's Pizza.
A full bar is available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Two state-of-the-art simulators providing a realistic golf experience

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you can bring your own clubs or rent an adult left or right hand set from Tee'd Up Tavern.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: You can bring food from neighboring restaurants like Classic Cafe, The Salty Heifer, or Casey's Pizza. A full bar with drinks is available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the exact time required to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is Tee'd Up Tavern kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children are allowed when accompanied by an adult until 10:00 PM.
